description_long: This bungalow features a compact, rectangular layout with a low-pitched, gable roof and a single above-ground story. The front facade includes a garage with a driveway, a main entrance, and a small porch area, flanked by a manicured lawn and decorative shrubs. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and landscaped with a mix of trees, bushes, and flower beds, providing a suburban residential feel. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a bay window on the right side of the front facade and additional windows distributed along the sides and rear. The roof includes skylights or dormer windows, enhancing natural light inside. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with paved walkways and a driveway leading up to the garage.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, garage, landscaped yard, and asymmetrical window arrangement, enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, bay window, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the wooden fence, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the continuation of the wooden fence and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, more trees, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with bay window on front facade
